audio.text: Bah! What do ye want? Can't ye see I'm workin' the forge? Speak quick, I've got iron to bend.
Aye, I make the finest blades this side o' the mountain. Don't bother hagglin' — me prices are me prices.
Bloody apprentices these days... couldn't tell a hammer from a horseshoe. Hmph.
Steel sings when ye treat 'er right. Most folk just don't listen close enough.
Off with ye then. And mind the sparks on yer way out — I'll not be patchin' yer britches!
